name: BEN_STAGE_INFO
description: BEN_STAGE_INFO contains staging information related to benefits.

columns.Name: STAGE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: RECEIVED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the request was made to the agent.

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of the document.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the record.

columns.Name: STATUS_DATE
columns.Comments: Date when the status was changed on this table.

columns.Name: FEED_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the message.

columns.Name: FEED_NAME
columns.Comments: Message name.

columns.Name: FEED_VAL
columns.Comments: Content of the message.

columns.Name: PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Number assigned to the person, to identify the person uniquely in any context, not dependent on being an employee, contingent worker, etc.

columns.Name: FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: System constructed version of name, used in more formal display purposes.

columns.Name: CON_PERSON_NUM
columns.Comments: Contact person number.

columns.Name: CON_FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: System constructed version of name of a contact, used in more formal display purposes

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign Key to PER_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: PGM_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the program.

columns.Name: IDENT_VAL

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Enrollment coverage start date.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: Enrollment coverage end date.

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who submitted the action.

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of Submission.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.
